SELECT * 
FROM PURC_ORDER_LINE POL
INNER JOIN PURCHASE_ORDER PO ON POL.PURC_ORDER_ID = PO.ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN RECEIVER_LINE RL ON POL.PURC_ORDER_ID = RL.PURC_ORDER_ID AND POL.LINE_NO = RL.PURC_ORDER_LINE_NO
LEFT OUTER JOIN RECEIVER R ON RL.RECEIVER_ID = R.ID
WHERE PART_ID IN ('1007-86', '1018-01', '1037-20', '1037-81', '1047-02', '1047-04', '1047-23', '1047-24', '1047-25', '1047-26', '1071-10', '1080-59', '1080-60', '2000-02', '2000-05', '2000-07',
